scripts.test:visual: docker run --rm -v .:/work -w /work --env-file .env mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.1-noble npx playwright test tests/e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts
scripts.test:visual:update: docker run --rm -v .:/work -w /work --env-file .env mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:v1.58.1-noble npx playwright test tests/e2e/visual-regression.spec.ts --update-snapshots
